images.title: Quick Stack Result
images.description: Quick Stack Nearby moves matching items into nearby containers and reports how many items moved.

images.title: Slot Rules Screen
images.description: Right-click the quick-stack button to lock slots or keep selected counts in the player inventory.

images.title: Inventory Button Tooltip
images.description: The inventory button quick-stacks to nearby containers and opens slot rules on right-click.

images.title: Quick Stack Artwork
images.description: Quick Stack Nearby artwork with items flying from a chest.
